privileged_info_summary: The task creates a Docker-based load balancer configuration automation challenge. The project is created at /home/ga/projects/acme-proxy with subdirectories for nginx configs and backend applications. The agent must create a Python script at /home/ga/projects/acme-proxy/sync_lb.py that dynamically discovers Docker containers labeled with role=backend on the acme-net network, generates nginx.conf from a template by replacing {{UPSTREAMS}} placeholders, and reloads the nginx container. The verification process uses a probe container named acme-verification-probe to test dynamic discovery capabilities. All data is synthetic, generated by the setup scripts that create Flask backend containers, Nginx configuration templates, and Docker Compose orchestration.
